name: avdeev.blog
description: Notes by Valentin Avdeev on 1C, AI, LLM infrastructure, BI, and automation of corporate processes.

skills.name: list-posts
skills.description: Machine-readable list of all blog posts (XML sitemap index).

skills.name: subscribe-feed
skills.description: RSS feed of blog posts for agents that poll for new content.

skills.name: read-post-markdown
skills.description: Read any post as plain Markdown by appending .md to its URL (e.g. /notes/<slug>.md).
